steps.title: Convert square units
steps.content:
Since $1$ centimeter equals $10$ millimeters, square the conversion for area:
$$
1\text{ cm}^2=100\text{ mm}^2
$$

steps.title: Divide by the area factor
steps.content: The density $0.734$ grams per square centimeter is the same as $0.734$ grams per $100$ square millimeters: $$ \frac{0.734}{100}=0.00734 $$ The answer is D.
